# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.

Prevent envoy no tls.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 127.0.0.1
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_80
    address:
      socket_address:
        protocol: TCP
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@': envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          connection_options:
            serve_http2_protocol_option: true
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router
            typed_config:
              '@@': envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v2.Router
          stat_prefix: api_gateway
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/api'
                route:
                  cluster_name: backend_cluster
  clusters:
  - name: backend_cluster
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoint:
          address:
            socket_address:
              protocol: TCP
              address: 127.0.0.1
              port_value: 8080
        locality:
          region: us-east-1
          zone: us-east-1a
    health_checks:
    - name: backend_service_health_check
      timeout: 2s
      interval: 10s
      healthy_threshold: 5
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      type: HTTP
      host: '127.0.0.1'
      port_value: 8080
      path: '/healthcheck'
      http_method: GET

  - name: backend_cluster2
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_cluster2
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoint:
          address:
            socket_address:
              protocol: TCP
              address: 127.0.0.1
              port_value: 8081
        locality:
          region: us-east-1
          zone: us-east-1a
    health_checks:
    - name: backend_service_health_check2
      timeout: 2s
      interval: 10s
      healthy_threshold: 5
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      type: HTTP
      host: '127.0.0.1'
      port_value: 8081
      path: '/healthcheck'
      http_method: GET

  - name: backend_cluster3
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: backend_cluster3
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoint:
          address:
            socket_address:
              protocol: TCP
              address: 127.0.0.1
              port_value: 8082
        locality:
          region: us-east-1
          zone: us-east-1a
    health_checks:
    - name: backend_service_health_check3
      timeout: 2s
      interval: 10s
      healthy_threshold: 5
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      type: HTTP
      host: '127.0.0.1'
      port_value: 8082
      path: '/healthcheck'
      http_method: GET
